Author: Serpens66
Name: Some Settings
Description: Adds small gameplay/QoL settings for Stronghold Crusader Definitive Edition.

Changes: Minimap dragging now follows the mouse cursor directly.
Add Slider for Market Buy/Sell Prices
Added checkbox to remember the last used AIV/AIC setting for the AI
Allow auto-sell in market if amount is bigger than 0 (so no longer at least 1 in storage)
